headline: Oil Is All About Iran Right Now But Chevron Focuses On Venezuela
summary: While U.S. oil prices held above $80 per barrel early Wednesday amid the ongoing war in Iran and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, Chevron and Shell are focused on securing significant oil production agreements in Venezuela.  Reuters, citing five sources, reported late Tuesday that Chevron and Shell are close to finalizing the first big oil production deals with Venezuela since the U.S., in early January, captured President Nicolas Maduro.  The report from Reuters comes about a month after Venezuela reformed its oil laws, granting foreign companies the ability to operate, export and sell Venezuelan oil even if they are minority partners of state-owned oil company PDVSA.

content.title: Oil Is All About Iran Right Now But Chevron Focuses On Venezuela
content.summary: While U.S. oil prices held above $80 per barrel early Wednesday amid the ongoing war in Iran and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, Chevron and Shell are focused on securing significant oil production agreements in Venezuela. The report from Reuters comes about a month after Venezuela reformed its oil laws, granting foreign companies the ability to operate, export and sell Venezuelan oil even if they are minority partners of state-owned oil company PDVSA.

headline: ETFs With Yields Above 10% Using Completely Different Strategies
summary: With the federal funds rate sitting at 3.75% and the 10-year Treasury yielding 4.13%, investors hunting for meaningful income have to venture well beyond government bonds. Three ETFs currently delivering above 10% yields do so through mechanisms that have almost nothing in common with each other, which makes them worth understanding on their own terms ... headline: Chevron Reshapes Global Portfolio And Valuation With Texas Move And Projects
summary: Chevron (NYSE:CVX) is relocating its corporate headquarters from California to Houston, Texas, reshaping its cost base and regulatory footprint. The company is close to expanded extraction agreements in Venezuela at the Petropiar project under new legal incentives. Chevron has advanced Cyprus’ offshore Aphrodite gas field into front end engineering, progressing contingent resources toward potential long term development. In Argentina, Chevron is re assessing its shale position as policy...
